zh.Correggio, Ferrara, Emilia-Romagna, Ital: 義大利艾米利亞-洛馬尼亞費拉拉費拉拉可雷吉
zh.lifeSummary: Marchese Federico Malaspina di Villafranca是Corrado Malaspina和Costanza Hohenstaufen的兒子，出生。他和Agnese del Bosco至少有4個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1264年在義大利。

zh-hans.Correggio, Ferrara, Emilia-Romagna, Ital: 意大利艾米利亞-洛馬尼亞費拉拉費拉拉可雷吉
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Marchese Federico Malaspina di Villafranca是Corrado Malaspina和Costanza Hohenstaufen的儿子，出生。他和Agnese del Bosco至少有4个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1264年在意大利。

nameMeanings.name: Malaspina
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Tino, Aldo, Antonio, Carmella, Guido, Mario.
from mala (feminine of malo) ‘bad, evil’ + spina ‘thorn’, applied as a nickname and personal name.

variants.name: La Spina
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Sal, Angelo, Mario, Rosario, Sebastiano, Carmelo, Gino, Giuseppe, Ignazio, Javier, Orazio, Salvatore.

from spina ‘thorn’ (from Latin spina), with the definite article la, applied as a topographic name for someone who lived by a thorn bush or in an area of scrubland, or (in a transferred sense) for someone who lived by the crest or ridge of a hill. It could also be a nickname for a tall, thin, spiky person.

variants.name: Spina
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Ciro, Antonio, Carmine, Angelo, Rocco, Vito, Carlo, Carmela, Santo, Vincenza, Vincenzo.

from spina ‘thorn, thorn bush’, used as a nickname in various senses, including ‘distress, sorrow’ (alluding to Christ's crown of thorns), and also as a personal name; or alternatively a habitational name from any of numerous places called with this word (in some instances with reference to the dedication of a shrine).

nameMeanings.name: Federico
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: See Frederick . The name was introduced to Sicily by the Normans, where it was borne by the son of the Norman Queen Constance and the German Emperor Henry VI . At the age of three, in 1197 , Federico became King of Sicily; he later went on to become King of the Germans and Holy Roman Emperor. He was a patron of the arts and sciences, and in 1224 founded the University of Naples.

variants.name: Frederick
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic origin, from fred, frid ‘peace’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced into Britain by them, but did not survive long. Modern use in Britain dates from the 17th century, and it became more frequent in the 18th among followers of the Elector of Hanover, who in 1714 became George I of England. It was reinforced by the vogue for Germanic names in Victorian times.

en.lifeSummary: Marchese Federico Malaspina di Villafranca was born as the son of Corrado Malaspina and Costanza Hohenstaufen. He had at least 4 sons and 2 daughters with Agnese del Bosco. He died in 1264, in Italy.

fr.lifeSummary: Marchese Federico Malaspina di Villafranca est né, fils de Corrado Malaspina et Costanza Hohenstaufen. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles avec Agnese del Bosco. Il est décédé en 1264, à Italie.

de.lifeSummary: Marchese Federico Malaspina di Villafranca wurde, als Sohn von Corrado Malaspina und Costanza Hohenstaufen geboren. Er hatte mit Agnese del Bosco mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1264 in Italien.

it.lifeSummary: Marchese Federico Malaspina di Villafranca è nato il come figlio di Corrado Malaspina e Costanza Hohenstaufen. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie con Agnese del Bosco. Morì nel 1264, nel Italia.

ja.Correggio, Ferrara, Emilia-Romagna, Ital: イタリアエミリア-ロマグナフエララフエララコレグジオ
ja.lifeSummary: Marchese Federico Malaspina di VillafrancaはCorrado MalaspinaとCostanza Hohenstaufenの息子として生まれた。彼はAgnese del Boscoとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1264年にイタリアで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Marchese Federico Malaspina di Villafranca(은)는 Corrado Malaspina(와)과 Costanza Hohenstaufen의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Agnese del Bosco(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1264년 이탈리아에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Marchese Federico Malaspina di Villafranca nasceu filho de Corrado Malaspina e Costanza Hohenstaufen. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas com Agnese del Bosco. Ele faleceu em 1264, em Itália.

ru.lifeSummary: Marchese Federico Malaspina di Villafranca родился. Его родителей звали Corrado Malaspina и Costanza Hohenstaufen. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери от Agnese del Bosco. Он умер в 1264 г. в местности Италия.

sm.da 1200 a 1220: mai le 1200 e o'o I le 1220

es.lifeSummary: Marchese Federico Malaspina di Villafranca nació como hijo de Corrado Malaspina y Costanza Hohenstaufen. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas con Agnese del Bosco. Murió en 1264, en Italia.
